1865560.name: Fantasy Grounds - Lankhmar: The Eyes of Goro'mosh Adventure
1865560.description:
Lankhmar: The Eyes of Goro’mosh Adventure

The Street of the Gods stretches from the Marsh Gate to the Temple of the Gods
of Lankhmar, with more prominent religions moving farther away from the Marsh Gate as they gain in followers and funding. A new faith has come to Lankhmar and it's becoming the latest rage among the wealthy and elite. But as the faith grows in strength and position on the Street of Gods, so do the number of bodies turning up mysteriously--more than usual for the City of Black Toga.
The Eyes of Goro'mosh  contains four linked Savage Tale adventures designed to be interspersed among other  Lankhmar  Savage Tales or those of the Game Master's own creation, with a climactic ending on the Street of the Gods! The Player Maps in this adventure use the Shockbolt Gamemasters Art Kit which come free with all Fantasy Grounds Unity licenses. These maps put less overhead on FGU users as they don't have to share large bitmaps. All of the maps have Line of Sight and Lighting added to fit the descriptions of the locations given herein.
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Joe Collins
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and a one time purchase of the Savage Worlds Adventure Edition ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
